anthropic_api_key.name: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Your Claude AI API key from console.anthropic.com. Powers all AI analysis.

market_data_source.name: Market Data Source
market_data_source.description: yahoo = free, no key. finnhub/alphavantage = free tier with API key. sim = offline simulation.

market_data_key.name: Market Data API Key
market_data_key.description: API key for Finnhub or Alpha Vantage (leave blank for Yahoo or sim).

trading_mode.name: Trading Mode
trading_mode.description: paper = simulation with real prices. live = real order execution via broker API.

risk_level.name: Risk Level
risk_level.description: Controls default position sizing. Conservative=1-2%, Moderate=2-4%, Aggressive=4-8% per trade.

tax_bracket.name: Tax Bracket
tax_bracket.description: Your income tax rate (0.10 to 0.37). Used for tax optimization calculations.

stop_loss_pct.name: Stop Loss %
stop_loss_pct.description: Default stop loss percentage per trade (e.g. 2.0 = 2%).

take_profit_pct.name: Take Profit %
take_profit_pct.description: Default take profit percentage per trade (e.g. 6.0 = 6%).

max_position_pct.name: Max Position Size %
max_position_pct.description: Maximum percentage of portfolio per single position (e.g. 5.0 = 5%).

daily_loss_limit.name: Daily Loss Limit ($)
daily_loss_limit.description: Bot pauses if daily losses exceed this dollar amount.

auto_analysis_interval.name: Auto-Analysis Interval (seconds)
auto_analysis_interval.description: How often Claude automatically scans the market. 0 = manual only. 600 = every 10 min.

broker_platform.name: Broker Platform
broker_platform.description: Your broker: alpaca, binance, coinbase, kraken, etc. Used to select the right API format.

broker_api_url.name: Broker API URL
broker_api_url.description: Base URL for your broker API, e.g. https://api.alpaca.markets/v2

broker_api_key.name: Broker API Key
broker_api_key.description: Your broker API key for authentication.

broker_api_secret.name: Broker API Secret
broker_api_secret.description: Your broker API secret (required by most brokers).

log_level.name: Log Level
log_level.description: Server logging verbosity. info is recommended for normal use.
